tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def open-prs (github_pull_requests {:state "open"}))

;; (a) Total count of open PRs
(def total-open (count open-prs))

;; (b) Count by repository, find the max
(def repo-counts (frequencies (map :repository open-prs)))
(def max-repo (apply max-key val repo-counts))

;; Return both answers
{:total_open_prs total-open :repo_with_most (key max-repo) :pr_count (val max-repo)}"}
